extName.description: Name of the extension shown in the browser toolbar and Chrome Web Store

extDescription.message: Match colors to CSS custom properties (variables) on any webpage
extDescription.description: Short description shown in the Chrome Web Store listing

extDescriptionLong.message: Scan any webpage for CSS custom properties, pick a color with the built-in eyedropper, and instantly find the closest matching variable. Supports hex, rgb, hsl, oklch, light-dark(), and more. Save variable lists for quick comparison across pages.
extDescriptionLong.description: Long description for reference in the Chrome Web Store listing (not used in code)

heading.description: Main heading displayed in the popup

openInWindow.description: Tooltip and aria-label for the pop-out button

scanning.description: Scan button label while scanning is in progress

pickColor.description: Label for the color picker button

listNamePlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the saved list name input

colorVariables.description: Summary label for the variables section

colorVariablesFiltered.description: Summary label with filtered and total count

searchVariablesPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the variable search input

noVariablesScanned.description: Message shown before any scan has been performed

noColorVariablesFound.message: No color variables found on this page.
noColorVariablesFound.description: Message shown when scan finds no color variables

noColorPicked.message: No color picked yet. Click the button above to start.
noColorPicked.description: Message shown before any color has been picked

noVariablesToCompare.message: No variables to compare. Scan the page first.
noVariablesToCompare.description: Message shown when a color is picked but no variables are scanned

deleteList.description: Aria-label for the delete button on a saved list entry

renameList.description: Aria-label for the rename button on a saved list entry

exportList.description: Aria-label for the export button on a saved list entry

import.description: Label for the import CSS file button
